project_context.archetype: Professional solar installer (YellowLite-inspired) with organic & technical precision
project_context.target_audience: Homeowners, Businesses in rural Indiana/Illinois seeking reliable solar, storage, and backup power
project_context.design_direction_note: YellowLite (Yellow Light) solar company inspired redesign: clean professional layout, strong benefit-driven hero with guarantee line, modular trust-focused sections, generous whitespace, clear process/value storytelling, while preserving Accutek's warm earthy palette (#E19233 primary), family-owned voice, and existing functionality.

colors.primary_solar_yellow: #E19233 (keep as main brand accent - perfect Yellow Light energy)

layout_and_spacing.approach: YellowLite-style: generous padding (py-20+), clean modular sections, strong stats/trust bars, card-based services with clear benefits. Hero with impact headline + guarantee line.

key_improvements_made: Hero redesigned with stronger benefit messaging, guarantee line, and refined trust stats (YellowLite influence)
Overall aesthetic shifted toward clean, trustworthy professional solar installer look while keeping Accutek branding and warmth
